summary: Developed 2 new tools: password-generator (在线密码生成器) + password-strength-checker (在线密码强度检测器). Both zh/en bilingual, v3.0 dark template with Schema, 4 pages verified via WebBridge browser testing. Fixed score thresholds bug in strength checker (adjusted from 85/70/50/25 to 80/60/40/20 for more realistic ratings). All JS valid, zero errors.
